title: Parent portal — backend endpoints/fields the frontend still needs
context: The Parent portal pages were migrated from mock (ParentContext, deleted) to real API calls. Below is data the UI renders but the backend does NOT expose. Reused endpoints: GET/PUT /Parents/me, /Parents/me/children, /Parents/me/dashboard, /Parents/me/report, /Wallet(+transactions/deposit/withdraw), /me/conversations, /classes/{id}/messages, /Classes, /Sessions/{id}/confirm, /classes/{id}/review, /me/reviews, /Notifications, /Users/me.

gaps.title: GET /Parents/me/children currently returns 403 for the Parent role
gaps.currentState: Known backend role bug — the children endpoint 403s for a logged-in Parent, so the children list is empty. The FE hook uses retry:false and renders an empty state. Fix the authorization so a Parent can read their own children.
proposedChanges: Allow role=Parent on GET /Parents/me/children (and the other /Parents/me/* routes).

gaps.title: Per-child sessions / tests / attendance for parents
gaps.currentState: A parent has no /me/sessions of their own, and there is no endpoint to list a child's sessions/tests/attendance. The schedule, tests, and attendance lists render empty. The confirm-attendance mutation (PATCH /Sessions/{id}/confirm) exists but is unreachable without a session list.

gaps.title: Per-child progress + subject-score analytics
gaps.currentState: childProgress and childSubjectScores (per-child GPA trend, subject scores, attendance, homework rate) have no backend source — all charts render empty. /Parents/me/report gives only { childrenCount, activeClasses, totalSpent, avgChildScore }.
gaps.proposedEndpoint: GET /api/Parents/me/children/{childId}/progress -> { gpaSeries, subjectScores, attendanceRate, homeworkRate } (mirror the proposed GET /Tutors/me/students item shape).

gaps.title: No pay-tuition endpoint
gaps.currentState: payChildTuition is disabled — tuition is escrowed at class creation and there is no endpoint to pay tuition for an existing class from the wallet (same as the student S-GAP-6).
gaps.proposedEndpoint: POST /api/classes/{classId}/pay-tuition { amount } if paying tuition outside class creation is a real flow; otherwise confirm it can be removed.

gaps.title: Reviews list lacks subject/className and is single-paged
gaps.currentState: GET /me/reviews returns bare ReviewResponse (no className/subject/tutorName), so the page joins against /Classes; only page 1 is fetched. Enriching the review DTO (className, subject, tutorName) and exposing total/totalPages would remove the join.
proposedChanges: Add className/subject/tutorName to the review DTO returned by /me/reviews; return PagedResult with total/totalPages.
